creator: mi@aldan.ziplink.net
text:
This is the port of NCSA's Hierarchical Data Format
	software (libraries, utilities, documentation).
	ImageMagick makes use of it (among other things).

How-To-Repeat: 
	The HDF_lib.tar.gz is already in
		ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming
	This is my first attempt to make a real FreeBSD-port,
	so it is likely to have some problems.

	It can optionally be built to use the preinstalled jpeg
	and z-libraries (NCSA's package uses the older releases
	of the libs).

	Yours,
		-mi
